programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who doesn't like a plate of good nachos or Buffalo wings? We discover when you can use supermarket products versus when only good, fresh ingredients will do. A simple, sweet-tart sangria finishes our party menu.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a cold day, few dishes are as comforting as a hearty soup—unless it turns out starchy or gluey. Watch as we make thick and creamy versions of two of our favorites: ham and split pea, and rustic potato-leek.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Rescue two favorite fancy vegetable dishes—twice-baked potatoes and stuffed bell peppers—from the clutches of cafeterias, bad steakhouses, and frozen food manufacturers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bistro classics, such as steak au poivre and crème brûlée, offer a taste of real French cooking without pretension. We show you how to create these dishes without spending all day in the kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make the perfect steakhouse dinner—salad with creamy blue cheese dressing and seared filet mignon.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We show you how to prepare fried rice and kung pao shrimp. Our findings of rice cookers and long-grain white rice guarantee perfect rice every time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Simple yet interesting, both chicken Milanese and chicken piccata are reliable test kitchen favorites. We like to start them on the stovetop but finish the cooking in the oven

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen provides foolproof recipes for two classic pasta sauces: puttanesca and Bolognese.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta with garlic and oil is perhaps the most famous quick pasta dish. It starts with ingredients on hand—garlic, good olive oil, hot red pepper flakes—and turns them into something special and uncommonly good.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We uncover the secrets to beef Burgundy at its best—and also show you a way to make portions of it ahead of time.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork chops are leaner than they used to be, which poses new problems for home cooks. We explain which chops to buy and how to cook them, ensuring perfectly cooked meat that is both crispy and juicy.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a hot summer's day, life doesn't get much better than a big, juicy, smoky slab of spicy, mouth-watering ribs. Our goal was to produce flavorful, juicy, tender ribs that would be well worth the time, money, and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We were intrigued with the notion of barbecuing a whole side of salmon. Our goal was to have this large piece of fish spend enough time over the coals to pick up some real wood flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We move the turkey out of the oven and onto the grill, freeing up precious cooking space for other Thanksgiving dishes and giving us a better tasting bird. We also perfect the flavor and texture of sweet potatoes and cranberry sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin can cost a small fortune, but it is one of the quickest and easiest large cuts to serve to a crowd. The key is to get good color development on the exterior without overcooking the interior.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thick, chewy chocolate cookies and spiced molasses cookies are classics. Watch as we discover which types of chocolate and molasses make these favorites great again.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In prison, as on the outside, a single decision can change a person's life forever; inmates make all kinds of fateful choices, but behind bars, there is no escaping the consequences of one's actions.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: In a life full of restrictions, we've seen inmates take control of whatever they can, despite the consequences; we've seen frustrated inmates reach their breaking point; in the battle of wills, some will take actions that can never be reversed.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Behind every murder is a motive; Behind every murder is a story and behind some murders, there is a person someone thought they could trust.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Three unforgettable inmates, each one about to cross the threshold to freedom; witness their joys, their fears, their triumphs and discover that sometimes the only thing tougher than being in prison, is staying out.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: For some kids, the revolving door of lockup seems to snag one generation after the next; 17-year-old Kenneth and 14-year-old Kentrell, have 10 brothers and sisters, a father in prison and a mother with a criminal record for public nuisance.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Figuring out what contributes to kids getting locked up is not an exact science; over the past six years, Aaron has become a familiar face at Lake County Juvenile; with his 18th birthday just days away, he finds himself back behind bars.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Juvenile Court Judge Mary Beth Bonaventura observes that an indicator of what will happen in a child's life can be found by looking at the family and how supportive it has been; the kids seem to know this, too.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: More than three thousand kids pass through the juvenile courts in Lake County, Indiana each year; here, consequences can range from a sleepless night in detention to the ultimate punishment for kids who keep coming back: Boys' School.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Ricky has spent a total of 266 days in Lake County, and another 16 months at a residential placement facility in Nevada; when he didn't return to his placement in Nevada after a weekend home pass, Ricky was picked up on a bench warrant.

programme.desc: Famous playwright, The Ivory Hill, hosts her production at Lucille's, but when an accident leaves Ivory unable to carry on, the family must decide who will fill her shoes. Meanwhile, Alfonso tries to secure a grant for the business .

programme.title: Mind Your Business
programme.desc: Alfonso must make a major career decision while Lucielle's son comes home with a big confession.

programme.title: Mind Your Business
programme.desc: Lucille forms a neighborhood watch after a series of items go missing; Henry and Alfonso's relationship is tested when an uncomfortable truth about Henry's past is revealed.

programme.title: Mind Your Business
programme.desc: After a client's wedding ceremony leaves the altar without a bride and groom, Alfonso decides to pop the big question, again. Meanwhile, Jordan befriends a deprived stranger whose needs are more than she can handle. Kiki Haynes Guest Stars.

programme.title: I Hate I Love You
programme.desc: A successful power couple is tested by betrayal and illegal activity. Both love and business face being destroyed.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: Last Call hosts a Valentine's Day party for singles; Darius finds himself juggling two dates; Arthur hires Drake "The Wrapper" as entertainment.

programme.title: Last Call

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike decides to meet with GG to discuss the rumor that has been swirling for months; the group embarks for Thailand to attend Reza's destination wedding; Asifa and Bobby approach their breaking point while 8,000 miles from home.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: In Thailand, the group visits a Buddhist temple; the crew gathers at what is supposed to be Reza and Adam's reception; Reza struggles with the impact of his decision; Mike faces a choice between his future wife and his lifelong friends.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Andy Cohen sits down with the group for the first time since the season finale in Thailand; GG and Mike discuss the rumor that divided the group; MJ and Asa face-off over Reza's bachelor party; Reza reveals the status of his relationship with Adam.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ talks about her love life; Reza returns after his heated departure; Bobby joins a tearful Asifa on the couch; Jessica paces in her trailer before joining the rest; the group erupts when Andy Cohen shares shocking news about Mike's new wife.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza reveals to Asa that he's finally ready to marry Adam; Mike tells Jessica he's finally ready to reconnect with his old friends; when the group comes together at Shervin's 35th birthday party, a troubled GG threatens to ruin the celebration.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza encounters opposition when he announces his plans for a surprise wedding; Jessica tells Mike what she expects from married life; Asa struggles with her new family business; MJ prepares to introduce the new man in her life to her mother, Vida.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: GG's health issues escalate and she calls on Shervin for support during a painful medical procedure; Mike and Jessica throw a backyard Shabbat party, but tensions fray when MJ reveals a secret Reza's not ready to share.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Asa deals with the stress of a new business and a photo shoot for her new clothing line, Asa Kaftans; the group plans a camping trip to address GG's erratic behavior; Mike and Jessica spend a night a home during which marital issues emerge.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: The camping trip turns into an intervention; Mike refuses to confide in his friends while dealing with his crumbling marriage; the group bonds while tackling a ropes course; GG refuses to confront her real issues.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Back from camping, a reinvigorated MJ focuses on starting a family with Tommy; Mike and Jessica start therapy; Shervin goes on a date with a sexy Australian; at Asa's mother's retirement party, the group discovers a bombshell about Mike.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza and Asa head to Palm Springs to plan Reza's surprise wedding to Adam; Mike shows up without his wife; as an unsuspecting Adam arrives, Reza becomes increasingly anxious over whether Adam has recovered from last year's canceled wedding.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: MJ faces fallout over her disintegrating relationship with Tommy; Reza throws himself headfirst into stand-up comedy; the group rallies together for Reza's debut comedy performance; Mike makes a valiant attempt to win his wife back.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: After a night of romance, Mike and Jessica discuss how to go about repairing their relationship; MJ confides in Asa that Tommy has moved out; Shervin accosts GG about the rumors concerning her illness at Asa's debut fashion show for Asa Kaftans.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reza plans a group trip to Belize in an effort to save Mike and Jessica's marriage; as the group touches down in the jungle, Mike waits nervously for his wife to arrive; MJ contemplates life without Tommy; GG's resentments spill over during dinner.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike escapes his marital problems by going sightseeing in the Belizean rainforest with Shervin, Nima and GG; a visitor surprises the group; Reza confronts Mike with newfound proof about his marriage, forcing Mike to reveal a dark secret.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS se somete a evaluaciones psicológicas obligatorias mientras investiga la muerte de un comandante naval.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El poder de la prensa
programme.desc: Frank enfrenta críticas públicas por una cámara corporal defectuosa durante un altercado. Danny y María protegen a un informante que es rechazado por el programa de protección de testigos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A punta de pistola
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan asesinatos de líderes comunitarios que parecen crímenes de odio. Frank se reúne con un grupo que busca justicia para las víctimas. Linda es asaltada y decide tomar medidas para aumentar su seguridad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Equipaje
programme.desc: Danny se siente desconcertado cuando descubre que un grupo de veteranos del ejército altamente entrenados son responsables de un robo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted woman gives deputies a fake name, but her brother accidentally reveals the truth, and two officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man assaults his sister and her dog, a gibberish-speaking man is arrested for attacking his neighbors, and a couple with no-contact orders tells conflicting stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to an altercation with an armed passenger, a man is accused of assault while searching for marijuana, and a woman on probation has mismatched plates.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is apprehended after trying to evade arrest, a convicted felon is detained when police make some illegal discoveries in his van, and deputies seize a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman goes to great lengths to hide her daughter, a couple's glovebox holds a surprise, and an Uber driver gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer chases down a woman escaping on her bike, a stolen car leads to a couple revealing their affairs, and a driver with some odd drinking habits is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Following his escape, Nate Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston becomes more determined than ever to track down Nake Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, after discovering that he's kidnapped his ex-wife, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After years of pursuit and a countless number of murders, Langston comes face-to-face with serial killer Nate Haskell inside the house where his killing spree began.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Multiple shootings and stabbings on a public tram leave the CSI team with one witness and a lot of questions.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Three suspects come forward with three different reasons why they killed an entire family and the CSI team has to determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While on a date, Stokes realizes a piece of art at an exhibit has decomposing body parts in it, which leads to a full-blown investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The former Mayor of Las Vegas is shot at the Mob Museum and the CSIs embark on a history lesson in search of clues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a hijacked medevac helicopter with CSI Brody aboard goes missing, the entire team is on hunt.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a Jane Doe is found near the freakish attractions of a 19th-century-inspired traveling sideshow, the team investigates a cast of unusual characters.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team arrives at a car crash, they find three casualties and a human brain that doesn't belong to any of the victims.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, decide sorprender a su novia en Las Vegas, descubre que ella está desaparecida y le pide a su amigo D.B. Russell su ayuda. Estrella invitada Gary Sinise de CSI:NY.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de la hermana de un famoso cantante cubano que se encuentra en la ciudad como parte de una gira por Estados Unidos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara es la principal sospechosa en una investigación después de un breve encuentro con un hombre y ella fue la última persona en verlo con vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando varios jugadores prominentes de póquer pierden la vida, se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar antes de que surjan más víctimas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se une a David Phillips en su reunión de la escuela secundaria cuando descubre que la reina del baile ha sido asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo cerca de una reserva forestal, descubren lo que podría ser un asesino en serie y su extraña guarida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI investigan un triple homicidio, Russell tiene que encontrar la manera de conectarse con una niña de 6 años que fue la única sobreviviente y testigo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un retiro espiritual popular cuando se encuentra un cuerpo flotando en un baño de barro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un cazador de fantasmas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Russell y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos, uno de los suyos se enfrenta al peligro en una arriesgada misión encubierta para acercarse al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson is killed in his own home and his body is missing, while his wife and son are left alive, but beaten and bound.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In the Everglades, near a controlled burn, Alexx and Delko search the crime scene. They are forced to take cover when a wall of fire overtakes them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio is quick to arrive on the scene when an armored truck carrying 3.2 million dollars is robbed in a daring downtown heist.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An adult film actress is found strangled to death in the park and the CSIs are called in to investigate and find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation leads the CSI team down a treacherous road that will lead to the tragic loss of one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Yelina's life is in danger when the Horatio and the CSI team works a case to convict a rapper suspected of a Miami-style drive-by.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El pasado de Horatio vuelve para perseguirlo cuando Julia lo arresta por asesinato. El equipo de CSI debe investigar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio enfrenta fantasmas de su pasado, el equipo corre contra el tiempo para salvar a Calleigh de un grupo de peligrosos secuestradores.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben actuar rápidamente para detener a un justiciero que ha causado una ola de asesinatos contra depredadores de Internet.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en un sumidero lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI a un robo, mientras investigan, descubren que el objetivo guarda un secreto impactante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Alexx se convierte en sospechoso de asesinato, salvarlo tiene terribles consecuencias. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben actuar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere debido a una llamada falsa a Emergencias, Horatio debe enfrentarse a un investigador privado que está destruyendo sistemáticamente al equipo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando alguien está decidido a destruir a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, Horatio arriesga su vida para salvar a su personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar a quién le disparó a Horatio, la evidencia los lleva a algunas de las personas más peligrosas de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la gasolina se vuelve tan cara que los residentes de Miami matan por ella, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con una de las redes criminales más sádicas de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la hija de la terapeuta de Delko es asesinada, Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben encontrar al asesino antes de que los secretos más oscuros de Delko salgan a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un salvaje doble asesinato en los Everglades hace que Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrenten a la fuerza bruta de la propia mafia rusa de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la boutique de moda más moderna de Miami, Horatio descubre que la inestabilidad de Julia la ha convertido en una bomba de tiempo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una grúa de 60 metros se estrella contra un rascacielos de Miami, pone en peligro a Calleigh y Delko y acaba con la esperanza de Horatio de atrapar a un famoso jefe del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Encuentran a un hombre esposado y apuñalado en su habitación de hotel, mientras que una broma en el laboratorio provoca una ruptura en el equipo de CSI y amenaza su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a street luger and the mysterious drowning of a woman in a self-sanitizing pay bathroom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a little girl and a fire set to her apartment building leaves CSI New York team member Stella feeling guilty and homeless.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A shark washes up on shore unloading a dead body and a bizarre crime scene that leaves the CSI New York team more than puzzled.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The bank robbery saga from last season continues as Mac seeks revenge after nearly being killed by the mysterious Joe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A free street concert quickly turns into a crime scene, the victim, in this case, has been mysteriously plagued with radiation.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a young archaeologist who may have unearthed the answer to one of New York City's oldest murder mysteries.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: El asesinato a tiros de un chico de 14 años frente a su hermano de 12 años lleva el deseo de justicia del detective Mac Taylor a otro nivel.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando una joven parece ser estrangulada mientras está en un chat en vivo que Adam presencia, el equipo de CSI debe determinar si fue real o una broma.

programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Drew can’t wait to tie the knot with Bianca in Vegas. But the closer they get, the more he second guesses their decision. When Bianca discovers Drew’s wavering, she freaks!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: During Spirit Week at Degrassi, everyone has something to prove. Cam feels threatened by Zig, Dallas makes a flirty bet with Alli, and Eli's relationship with Clare is tested.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes at Degrassi, everyone deals with the situation in a different way. As the students struggle to cope, Simpson cancels Spirit Week.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by Degrassi's recent tragedy, Eli invites Jake and Mo to a secret party. Meanwhile, Marisol tries to reunite Jake and Katie, and Jenna forms an unexpected bond with Connor.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worried about Eli's mental state, Clare becomes overprotective. Katie wants Jake back, but is it too late? Jenna must choose between two guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Drew moves out, there's a break-in at the loft, and Fiona fears for her safety. Someone from Dallas' past pays him a surprise visit. A tough assignment forces Zig to think about the mistakes he's made.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Rottweilers with behavior problems; a small mixed-breed fails two obedience classes; a vizsla needs help adjusting to a move from the country to the city.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman mix instigates fights at the dog park; a Pomeranian charges other dogs; an aggressive terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German shepard who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple with three unruly dogs, one with aggression issues; a poodle who fears the back door since running into the screen door; a Weimaraner who is territorial and aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog with an abusive past fears men; a Border Collie mix refuses to leave his chair and is afraid of leashes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers Hank's dark secret -- an illegitimate son.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A famous civil war photographer realizes he may be taking his last picture after Dr. Mike discovers that he is going blind.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels attempt to save a troubled marriage when the neglected wife encounters a man with whom she was once in love.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: At a time when the country is on the brink of peace, Monica brings a group of Northern Ireland teenagers, both Protestant and Catholic, to America to discover the true meaning of peace.

programme.title: Kickboxer III (The Art Of War)
programme.desc: David Sloan (Mitchell ) travels to Rio de Janeiro where the action is hotter, the women sexier, and the competition deadlier than ever before.

programme.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
programme.desc: David Sloan is on a mission to free his wife who has been enslaved by an evil world champion, Tong Po. He attempts to gain entry into Po’s savage kingdom by fighting in the tournament of champions where the winner takes all.

programme.title: The Redemption: Kickboxer 5
programme.desc: A retired kickboxer goes on a mission to avenge the brutal death of his promising young student. Revenge is not easy, however, as the target of his wrath is a leader of an underworld kickboxing league.

programme.title: Slaughter In San Francisco [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: A Chinese-American cop, skilled in martial arts, battles the most powerful criminal gang in San Francisco that is responsible for the death of his partner.

programme.title: Good Guys Wear Black
programme.desc: Action superstar Chuck Norris stars as John T. Booker, the former leader of an elite commando unit who must uncover the reason why his former squad members are being systematically murdered one by one. Anne Archer and James Franciscus co-star.

programme.title: A Force Of One
programme.desc: In this thrill-a-minute film, action superstar Chuck Norris stars as a martial arts champion enlisted to help track down a serial killer...and the man responsible for the murder of his adoptive son. Jennifer O'Neill and Clu Gulager also star.

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is back in this action-packed martial arts showcase co-starring the legendary Lee Van Cleef. Norris takes on his adoptive brother and a training camp where terrorists are being taught the secret killing techniques of the ninja!

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Jenji gets jealous of Fire Heart. He takes Fire Heart to live in the forest. When he goes back to find him, Fire Heart is gone. In the end, Jenji sees how selfish he was.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The Rangers get lazy and use their magic for everything. When fighting becomes too tiring for them, the Rangers want to use Jenji. Evil captures Jenji and wishes there were never any Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Imperious has wished the Power Rangers away. The world has lost its color and evil now rules. The Tribunal of Magic is the only entity that can reverse the wish. The teens go to the Tribunal of Magic and their request is denied.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The Tribunal of Magic has turned down the teens' request to restore things back to the way they were.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Imperious makes Koragg stand trial for his countless failures. In the end, Koragg argues that he fights with honor. Imperious does not and should not be trusted. The master agrees and returns Koragg's power to him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Daggeron and Udonna finally tell the Rangers, in detail, the full story of the Great War... including revealing to them the stories of the sorcereress' husband, Leanbow, and long-lost son, Bowen.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Koragg was really Leanbow all this time. Nick finds out he's really Leanbow and Udonna's son. In the end, Leanbow finishes what he started and goes down fighting the Master back into his hole.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: With Udonna gone, Mystic Force faces a new terror. 10 Terrors rise against the Rangers. Magma is the first Terror the Rangers must face.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Oculus is chosen to capture the Light. He is able to take all the other Rangers down one by one. In order to defeat him, Nick must learn to connect with Fire Heart.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Nick & Vida keep arguing. Hekatoid slimes them so they can't morph. As stubborn as they are, they need to learn to work together in order to save the others from Serpentina.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Leanbow is stopping the Master from rising and Sculpin has a plan to stop him. The Snow Prince commands that instead of being a teacher, Daggeron should take a lesson from Nick on following his gut.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Hekatoid has captured Udonna and the Rangers chase after him in his own dimension in order to rescue Nick's mom. Daggeron is in the real world trying to stop all the tadpoles Hekatoid has lain to destroy the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The teens lose their power trying to save Udonna.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Matoombo is chosen to bring forth the Master. But Matoombo doesn't want to hurt anyone. Vida teams up with him to try to seal the Master away forever.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Itassis doesn't want to fight for the Master anymore and defies his wishes. The Master takes matters into his own hands and destroys Mystic Mother. The end of all good magic may be near.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: In the final confrontation with The Master, the Mystic Force has suffered great losses. With Daggeron and Leanbow defeated, the Rangers must use all their magic to try and save both the Surface World and the Magical Realm.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Billionaire treasure hunter Andrew Hartford finds the ancient Corona Aurora, known as the powerful Crown of the Gods.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Hartford is kidnapped by Moltor, who also steals the Corona Aurora. Mack must prove himself as the Red Ranger and aid the team in saving his father, before they must use their DriveMax Zords to save an island from destruction by a giant sea creature.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Will's self-reliancy causes friction within the team. The Rangers seek one of the Corona Aurora gems in the underwater ruins of Atlantis.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Dax rescues a girl named Mira from a monster attack, and they become a couple. Can their romance survive the strain it's putting on the Ranger's place on the team, or will a mysterious third villain mastermind put an end to their relationship?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: After putting a bystander in jeopardy, Mack doesn't feel he's cut out to be a Ranger. But the team'll need him to pilot the Drill Driver, when Moltor's weather device creates an avalanche of snow on top of their Zords!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Searching the island of St. Lucia for the first jewel of the Corona Aurora, the Rangers stumble upon the ghost of Brownbeard, the pirate.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny's competitive nature and drive to always win begins to grate upon her teammates. Will things get worse when she butts heads with Mack over first usage of the latest weapon.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Will is fired by Hartford for selling Zord tech on the side! Taking his Tracker with him, the Black Ranger joins up with Miratrix, who's already beat the Overdrive Rangers to the next piece on their jewel-chase.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Flurious & Moltor put aside their sibling rivalry and combine forces against the Rangers. With Moltor's Giant Robot and Dragonizer, they manage to capture the DriveMax Megazord!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Dax eyes a film called "Ninja Rumba" as his big break as an actor. But Mr. Hartford refuses to allow him to take the role, since it may conflict with his Rangerly duties.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers visit Rose's college in London to try to get the parchment deciphered, only to lose it to Tyzonn, Moltor's latest alien lizard henchman.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mack joins forces with Tyzonn, learning that the reptilian creature is actually a human from the planet Mercury, cursed by Moltor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The search for the next jewel leads the Rangers to Portugal, then to Brazil, with a new group of villains, the Fearcats, always one step ahead of them!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: It's up to Mr Hartford to restore the liquidized Tyzonn to his human form. But even then, will the man from Mercury join the team, or will his past with an ill-fated Intergalactic Emergency Response crew keep him from it?

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: Sue psyches herself up to speak to the Plast-a-Ware shareholders' meeting. Frank gathers some accomplices to take down Scoop, but in true Murphy family fashion, nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: The Murphys kick off summer with a trip to the town Memorial Day parade, where bottled-up frustrations and fears about the new baby boil over.

programme.title: F is for Family

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.
